note: Estimated figures based on known algorithmic costs. In-process benchmarks match expected mutex-bound performance. Distributed benchmark estimates a 0.5ms loopback RTT to Redis.

results.note: estimated — atomic add is cheaper than mutex acquisition

results.note: estimated — network RTT dominates even on loopback (~0.5ms)
estimated — same cost as acquire: one mutex + map read
